title: galeopsis speciosa subsp. sulphurea
intro: Galeopsis speciosa subsp. sulphurea is a subspecies of the species Galeopsis speciosa, commonly known as Yellow Hemp-nettle, a perennial herb native to Europe. This plant is valued for its medicinal properties, particularly its expectorant and anti-inflammatory effects, which make it useful in treating respiratory issues such as bronchitis and asthma. The health benefits of Galeopsis speciosa subsp. sulphurea include its ability to reduce inflammation, ease coughs, and soothe sore throats, as well as its potential to aid in the treatment of digestive issues and skin conditions. Herbal preparations of Galeopsis speciosa subsp. sulphurea include teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be used to harness its medicinal properties and promote overall well-being.
